label: Ad hoc information gathering / document search
description: User searches for specific information across documents or a corpus, without a pre-defined query plan.

label: Long-term information tracking / keeping up to date
description: Monitoring a topic, entity, or situation over time for changes or updates.

label: Triage / filtering / classification
description: Sorting, prioritizing, or categorizing items based on criteria.

label: Reading / learning / sensemaking
description: Understanding, synthesizing, or making sense of complex information.

label: Factual question answering
description: Answering who/where/when questions with specific factual responses.

label: Long-form drafting / report generation
description: Producing extended written outputs like reports, summaries, or analyses.

label: Information verification / grounding
description: Checking whether AI-generated content is accurate, sourced, and trustworthy.
